stories.title: World Cup live updates: Spain cruising vs. Saudi A...
Schwarber's 3 HRs, Harper's cycle propel Phillies
stories.summary: Kyle Schwarber hit three home runs and Bryce Harper became the 11th player in franchise history to hit for the cycle as the Phillies beat the Mets 15-3.

stories.title: Ivory Coast boss slams Germany's 'lack of fair pla...
stories.summary: Ivory Coast head coach Emerse Faé has criticized what he said was a lack of fair play from Germany during his team's 2-1 World Cup defeat on Saturday at BMO Field.

stories.title: Sources: Goodwin joining Gillespie in Suns return
stories.summary: The Suns have reached a second deal this weekend, as free agent guard Jordan Goodwin intends to join Collin Gillespie in re-signing in Phoenix, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Oilers re-sign Dickinson to 5-year, $20M contract
stories.summary: The Edmonton Oilers re-signed Jason Dickinson to a five-year contract worth $20 million on Sunday, preventing the defensive-minded center from testing the free agent market.
